name: product-description
description: Write compelling product descriptions that convert browsers into buyers
logic: Step 1: Check brand-voice.md for brand consistency.
Step 3: Generate 3 selling angles (Luxury/Minimal, High-Energy, Direct/Tech).
Step 4: For each angle, include Hook Title, 'Big Promise', and Short Description.
Step 5: Provide full Product Detail: Long Desc, 5 Bullet Benefits, Specs Table, and 3 FAQs.
Step 6: Finalize with a Psychology Breakdown for the buying trigger.
